caption:
Buying a vintage watch should feel exciting, not uncertain.

At Mainspring, every piece is checked, serviced if needed, and explained — so you know exactly what you’re buying and why it’s worth it.

It’s simple: we want you to love your watch for years to come.

Whether you’re just starting your collection or adding your next favourite, you’ll find watches here that are honest, well-kept, and ready to wear.

Your personal guide to better watches,
Erkan😊

.
.
.
.
#watchesofinstagram #watchesoftheday #dubaiwatches #watchesformen #watchesforsale #watchesforher #vintagewatches

Before buying a second-hand watch, ensure your watch's reference number matches with your watch, and secondly ensure your movement has been used by the manufacturer for your reference number. These two checks are not enough but are the main points of a verification..

At Mainspring, we make all the required and detailed inspections before we buy a watch to display in our store and present to our customers. 
We issue a store authenticity liability certificate with each watch we sell and also provide 3 months warranty.
Shop in confidence, buy authentic.
www.mainspringsubai.com 

Visit our store @theb1mall everyday
Meet us @dubaifleamarket everyweekend

#watch #authentic #vintagewatch #swisswatch#dubaiwatches

1904, Louis Cartier granted the wish of the famous Brazilian aviator Alberto Santos Dumont: to be able to tell time while flying. The birth of one of the first ever wristwatches sealed the bonds of friendship between these two pioneers. 

Our Santos watch, is the medium model, has a mechanical movement with automatic winding, caliber 1847 MC. The Steel case has steel bezel set with 206 brilliant-cut Cartier diamonds totaling 0.64 carats. 
Full steel bracelet comes with “SmartLink” adjustment system. Second bracelet in calfskin, with steel interchangeable deployant buckle is also included. Both are equipped with the “QuickSwitch” interchangeability system. 
Case width: 35.1 mm, thickness: 8.83 mm. Water-resistant up to 10 bar (approx. 100 meters/330 feet).

Our watch is purchased from Dubai Mall Cartier Boutique in 2025 and in excellent condition.
Its from the first owner and the set includes the original invoice as well.

Full set includes the watch with Cartier diamonds and full bracelet, original certificate and books, boxes, extra Cartier leather strap and clasp, link removing tool, the invoice from Cartier. 

You can view it at our shop in @theb1mall daily open 1:30PM-11:00PM.

Price; 47,500dhs
Tabby, Tamara, card and cash payment options are available.

#swisswatch #luxury #designer
